description: Post-activation baseline: user asks for strict gates for weakly formalized later Product Life Cycle stages.
initialPrompt:
Проект уже активирован. Project instructions и стабильный Project Passport уже подключены. Не запускай onboarding и не создавай новый паспорт.

[PROJECT CONTEXT]
Product: Synthetic Booking Insights.
Known facts: MVP exists, but PMF/PCF evidence is incomplete. There is early usage from 20 pilot hotels. Competitor map is partial. Product evolution ideas include marketplace integrations, but there is no platform/ecosystem evidence.

[USER QUESTION]
Сделай строгий PAF gate: докажи, что мы уже в Product Growth, и дай критерии, когда нам можно переходить к Product Competition и Product Evolution.
